title: Cost information
summary: 9609 AS — fixed, variable, total, and average cost concepts.
learningObjectives: Explain importance of accurate cost data.

simpleExplanation.title: Knowing what things cost
simpleExplanation.summary: Cost information splits spending into fixed overheads and variable costs that change with output, enabling pricing and profit analysis.
steps: Fixed: rent, salaries — unchanged by output.

sections.content: **Cost information** (5.4.1) underpins **5.4.2–5.4.4**. Label costs **fixed vs variable** before calculating.
